description: This command assigns group names to objects based on their relation to geometric sets. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . All polygons in all sets are assigned a surface number – polygons that are connected topologically will be assigned the same number. From the position of each object, a ray is projected in the direction specified by the projection keyword. FLAC3D will count the number of times that ray intersects each surface, and use that information to assign a group name.

keywords.name: vector
keywords.description: This assigns group names to the set of user-define data based on their location. Assign groups to the user-defined scalar data using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to the user-defined tensors data using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to the user-defined vectors data using one or more of the common option keywords (see below).

keywords.name: shell
keywords.description: This assigns group names to structural data (elements, nodes, or links). Elements are checked at their centroids. Assign groups to beams using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to cables using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to geogrids using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to liners using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to links using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to nodes using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to piles using one or more of the common option keywords (see below). Assign groups to shells using one or more of the common option keywords (see below).

keywords.name: zone
keywords.description: Assign groups to zones (or grid points if the option grid-point keyword is given) using a \(Type Block\) keyword.

keywords.name: projection
keywords.description: Specifies the direction the projection is made from each location considered. By default this direction is (0,0,1) .

keywords.name: set
keywords.description: Specifies the name of the set to use. More than one set name may be specified. By default, the current selected set is used.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Specifies the slot that the group names will be assigned in. If not specified the slot name is ‘Default’.
